## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is trending positively with increased impressions, clicks, and keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [Focus remains on driving relevant traffic before prioritizing lead generation metrics](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [New content ideas presented, emphasizing alignment with Abnormal's core offerings (email security, behavioral AI)](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Publishing cadence of 13 articles this week, with 10 more in final review, maintaining momentum](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [Impressions and clicks increasing due to regular publishing](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Gained more keywords; average position updated and accurate](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=138.0)
  - [Glossary refreshes: impressions up, clicks steady, CTR down (likely due to AI overviews gaining top-of-funnel traffic)](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
  - [Seeing more LLM mentions, potentially due to FAQ implementation](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=184.0)

### Traffic and Conversion Strategy

  - [Current focus: Driving relevant traffic before prioritizing conversion metrics](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Key engagement metrics to monitor: scroll depth, time on page, repeat visitors](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Balancing high-volume keywords with strategic, lower-volume keywords targeting decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Current main CTA is "Ask for a Demo" (10% conversion) with gated content (1-2% conversion)](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Content Ideation and Approval Process

  - [28 new topic ideas presented, based on demo transcripts and aligned with Abnormal's messaging](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Emily to review and approve ideas, maintaining async process via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [Emphasis on keeping a healthy queue of approved topics to maintain publishing volume](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)

### Keyword Strategy

  - [Primary focus remains on "email security" despite shift towards AI messaging](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1215.0)
  - "Behavioral AI" emerging as a key differentiator, currently ranking \#1 for that term
  - [Suggestion to create industry-specific content series (e.g., "Email Security for Healthcare")](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [13 articles published this week](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [10 more articles in final review, to be published between today and tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1526.0)
  - [Team working to ensure all new content aligns well with overall strategy](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mariana to send Emily links to new topic ideas for review](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Emily to review and approve new topic ideas, notifying via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Team to revisit original keyword research to refocus on core target terms](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)
  - [Mara and Mariana to prepare content performance forecasting report](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Team to share updated ICP, persona, and strategy artifacts with Abdallah and Emily for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Explore potential for creating industry-specific content series](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
  - [Continue maintaining high publishing volume to drive performance gains](https://fathom.video/share/jhPWozZn3FFQw_ZYoZ1duL63qeDp7EBg?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
